specs.title: cp-000: Error banner dismiss button is text Dismiss NOT an X icon styled text-red-400 ho
cp-001: Header setSortByrelevance sets sortDir desc not asc
cp-002: Loading skeleton header 1 title skeleton h-7 w-40 2 button skeletons h-9 w-28 ro
cp-003: Loading skeleton uses identical height constraint h-calc100vh-7rem as actual pag
cp-004: Sidebar skeleton glass-panel rounded-2xl p-3 h-full with 8 rows h-9 rounded-lg
cp-005: Sidebar skeleton hidden below lg breakpoint matches actual sidebar
cp-006: Article area 6 SkeletonCard components in space-y-2 layout
cp-007: Error boundary uses ErrorDisplay shared UI component
cp-008: ErrorDisplay shows WarningCircle icon 32px in bg-red-50010 container
cp-009: ErrorDisplay Try Again button includes ArrowCounterClockwise icon
cp-010: ErrorDisplay calls SentrycaptureExceptionerror on mount when error is present
cp-011: Error boundary maps reset prop to onRetry callback on ErrorDisplay
cp-012: Empty state uses EmptyState shared UI component
cp-013: EmptyState title styling text-lg font-semibold text-ink mb-2
cp-014: EmptyState description styling text-sm text-ink-muted max-w-sm mb-6
cp-015: EmptyState action button styling bg-brand text-white text-sm font-medium hoverbg
cp-016: Sidebar panel glass-panel rounded-2xl h-full overflow-y-auto p-3
cp-017: Filter section has bottom border border-b border-border-subtle with mb-3 pb-3
cp-018: FILTER header styled text-10px font-semibold tracking-widest text-ink-muted60
cp-019: View filter buttons w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium
cp-020: All Articles uses Rss icon 16px
cp-021: Unread uses Circle icon with weightfill and classNametext-brand always
cp-022: Starred uses Star icon weight is fill ONLY when viewFilter starred isAllSelected
cp-023: View filter active highlighting requires BOTH viewFilter fkey AND isAllSelected
cp-024: View filter buttons call setSelectedFeednull AND setSelectedFoldernull in additi
cp-025: Folder header uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-semibold
cp-026: Folder child feeds indented with ml-2 wrapper div
cp-027: FeedItem name derived from subdisplayName subfeedSourcetitle
cp-028: FeedItem unread badge text-10px font-medium tabular-nums px-15 py-05 rounded-ful
cp-029: FeedItem mute button title attribute Unmute when subisMuted Mute when not
cp-030: FeedItem mute button disabled styling disabledopacity-40
cp-031: FeedItem click uses subfeedSourceId for setSelectedFeed NOT subid
cp-032: Mute PATCH URL uses subid subscription id different from feedSourceId
cp-033: Mute PATCH body isMuted subisMuted
cp-034: Folder unread count text-10px tabular-nums text-ink-muted right-aligned
